checkin.journal:
Grateful for: New ideas, cosita family friends ❤️❤️❤️, being calm, “okey”, I have my book, my faight, if things are tough you need to understand this is all part of nature
Today great: - a good pong pong session
- me writing the speech
- this weird neural thingy to stop
Affirmation: We need to keep it together especially on day like this.
Amazing things: Amazing thing today that happened: I somehow managed to play ping pong, we got another blood result, another confusion but I'm COVID negative s
